steps.name: Given a cart of RPTs non-multibeneficiary
And a single RPT of type BBT with 2 transfers of which 1 are stamps
And an existing payment position related to first RPT with segregation code equals to 48 and state equals to VALID

attachments.name: Step: [an existing payment position related to first RPT with segregation code equals to 48 and state equals to VALID] - Sent request
